metadata.description: Self-dogfood marketplace for agent-squad. Points at cli/src/agent_squad/template/ so edits to the canonical source are immediately live in this repo on /reload-plugins. Consumer repos generate a different marketplace.json via `agent-squad init` that points at .agent_squad/.

plugins.name: agent-squad
plugins.description: Vendored agent squad — ticket-manager, manager, worker agents and supporting skills.
